$comment: T8.3.C threshold config — baseline OK/WARN/FAIL bands per metric.
Read by `aggregate.ts`; consumed by `SUMMARY.md` and the hotspot
ranking that feeds T8.3.D. These numbers are deliberately rough —
they're calibrated against the FIRST baseline run, not a tuned target.
T8.3.D will tighten the bands once it has a clearer picture; T8.3.E's
* `okMin` set ⇒ metric is higher-is-better. value ≥ okMin → OK;
value ≥ warnMin (and < okMin) → WARN; otherwise FAIL.
* `okMax` set ⇒ metric is lower-is-better. value ≤ okMax → OK;
value ≤ warnMax (and > okMax) → WARN; otherwise FAIL.
* A scenario block in `scenarios.<name>.<metric>` overrides the
matching `metrics.<metric>` entry for cells of that scenario.

cold-boot.$comment: Bundle parse adds a ~150ms baseline; loosen long-task bounds.

ws-patch-flood.$comment: Designed to stress the renderer; FPS is the canonical signal, totalLT is naturally larger.

cluster-expand-collapse.$comment: Drilling clusters does real work; bounded by the action count, not the user wait. T8.3.E target.
